description_long: This is a pair of scissors featuring two elongated, sharp metal blades joined at a central pivot, with each blade extending into a looped handle. The handles are coated in a glossy red material, providing a comfortable grip and a striking visual contrast to the matte black blades. The finger loops are oval-shaped and appear to be symmetrical, accommodating both left- and right-handed users. The blades are slender and taper to a pointed tip, suitable for precision cutting tasks. The central joint is a visible rivet, ensuring smooth opening and closing action. No visible brand markings or logos are present on the handles or blades.
description: A pair of scissors with glossy red symmetrical handles and long, pointed black blades joined by a central rivet. The design is ergonomic and suitable for precise cutting.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the black blades and the red handles, highlighting the scissors' slender profile.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the symmetrical red finger loops and the closed black blade tips facing forward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other profile of the scissors with both handles and blades visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the red handles and the broad, flat surface of the closed blades.
attribute_handle_type: Symmetrical, oval-shaped handles with a glossy plastic coating, ambidextrous and ergonomic for general use.
attribute_blade_joint_type: Visible rivet joint, non-adjustable, standard fixed pivot design.
attribute_finger_loop_design: Two equal-sized, oval finger loops without soft inserts or texturing, suitable for multiple finger sizes.
attribute_blade_tip_style: Pointed blade tips designed for precision cutting.
